title: Guests
content:
"Here's a health to thee and thine
     From the hearts of me and mine;
     And when thee and thine
     Come to see me and mine,
     May me and mine make thee and thine
     As welcome as thee and thine
     Have ever made me and mine."
meaning:
This evocative piece by Unknown, titled "Guests", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
